dap_profiles.name: Android (Generic DAP OS - FiiO / Sony / iBasso / HiBy)
dap_profiles.hint: Generic Android players usually detect playlists from a Playlists folder on the same storage.

dap_profiles.name: USB Audio Player Pro
dap_profiles.hint: UAPP commonly uses Music/Playlists for imported playlist files.

dap_profiles.name: Poweramp
dap_profiles.hint: Poweramp scans storage for M3U/M3U8 playlists and maps by file paths.

dap_profiles.name: HiBy Music
dap_profiles.hint: HiBy Music usually reads playlists from HibyMusic/Playlists.

dap_profiles.name: Neutron Music Player
dap_profiles.hint: Neutron commonly stores and imports playlist files in NeutronMP/Playlists.

dap_profiles.name: Foobar2000
dap_profiles.hint: Foobar2000 mobile can import playlists from its app data folder.

dap_profiles.name: Mango OS (iBasso Pure Mode)
dap_profiles.hint: Mango OS typically expects plain M3U playlists close to the music library.

dap_profiles.name: FiiO Pure Music Mode
dap_profiles.hint: FiiO Music often reads playlist files from FiiOMusic/playlist.

dap_profiles.name: Sony Walkman App
dap_profiles.hint: Sony Walkman app generally detects M3U8 playlists in Music/Playlists.

dap_profiles.name: Rockbox
dap_profiles.hint: Rockbox can load playlists directly from a Playlists folder.

dap_profiles.name: Hidizs AP80 Pro Max (Hidizs OS)
dap_profiles.hint: Hidizs AP80 typically uses playlist_data and relative parent path prefixes.
